revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-4-115

A device comprising opaque strips, usually mounted so that each may be rotated through about 90 degrees on an axis. 

All strips rotate simultaneously so as alternately to exhibit or obscure a light.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig36.jpg|400px|border]]
